args.query: SELECT o.OwnerId, o.CreatedDate, c.CompanySignedDate FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON LTRIM(o.ContractID__c, '#') = LTRIM(c.Id, '#') WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate <= '2023-04-30'

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.OwnerId, o.CreatedDate, c.CompanySignedDate FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON LTRIM(o.ContractID__c, '#') = LTRIM(c.Id, '#') WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate <= '2023-04-30'

args.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Opportunity WHERE CloseDate LIKE '2023-04%'; SELECT Id, CompanySignedDate FROM Contract WHERE CompanySignedDate LIKE '%2023-04%';

args.query: SELECT o.Id, o.CloseDate, o.ContractID__c, c.CompanySignedDate, o.StageName, o.OwnerId, o.CreatedDate FROM Opportunity o LEFT JOIN Contract c ON LTRIM(o.ContractID__c, '#') = LTRIM(c.Id, '#') WHERE o.CloseDate LIKE '2023-04%'

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.Id, o.CloseDate, o.ContractID__c, c.CompanySignedDate, o.StageName, o.OwnerId, o.CreatedDate FROM Opportunity o LEFT JOIN Contract c ON LTRIM(o.ContractID__c, '#') = LTRIM(c.Id, '#') WHERE o.CloseDate LIKE '2023-04%'

args.query: SELECT o.Id, o.CloseDate, c.CompanySignedDate, o.OwnerId, o.CreatedDate FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON LTRIM(o.ContractID__c, '#') = LTRIM(c.Id, '#') WHERE c.CompanySignedDate = '2023-04-15'

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.Id, o.CloseDate, c.CompanySignedDate, o.OwnerId, o.CreatedDate FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON LTRIM(o.ContractID__c, '#') = LTRIM(c.Id, '#') WHERE c.CompanySignedDate = '2023-04-15'
